mapper.update: create table if not exists zephyr_skill_configs ( id varchar(64) primary key, user_name varchar(64) not null, skill_name varchar(128) not null, display_name varchar(256), description text, source varchar(32) not null, source_url varchar(1024), version varchar(32), enabled smallint default 1, install_path varchar(512), created_at bigint, updated_at bigint ); create index if not exists idx_zephyr_sc_user on zephyr_skill_configs(user_name); create index if not exists idx_zephyr_sc_skill_name on zephyr_skill_configs(skill_name);
